prompt: Edit image 1: Transform the cafe receipt into a mechanics invoice by changing the main total amount "$8.56" to match the "$154.06" total value found on the receipt in image 2.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1, the cafe receipt, to transform it into a mechanics invoice. Use image 2 as a reference for the visual style and content of a mechanics invoice.
Change the business name at the top of image 1 from 'Atomic Cafe - Newburyport (NPT)' to a mechanics-related name, similar to 'EAST MECHANICS, INC.' from image 2.
Update all instances of the total amount '$8.56' (including the prominent central figure and the final 'Total' at the bottom) to '$154.06', matching the 'Receipt Total' in image 2.
Adjust the itemized list (e.g., 'Sandwiches') and associated subtotal and sales tax details (currently 7%) to reflect mechanics services and to correctly sum to the new $154.06 total, adopting the 6.25% sales tax rate from image 2.
objects: itemized list of mechanics services (e.g., Front and rear brake cables, New set of pedal arms, Labor)
'Atomic Cafe - Newburyport (NPT)' text (should not be present)
